name: {Kist} Dust Sans
description:
Accidental kiss

ART IS MINE!

Find art here

It was training day in the castle and horror, dust, and killer were training. Horror was taking a break, drinking water and cooling off.

Meanwhile killer and dust were fighting and sparing, with dust firing bone attacks at killer and killer fighting him with his knife. They continue to go at it with one another till dust eventually pins killer to the wall.

"Haha! Good one dust! Another round?"

Before dust could respond, horror accidentally bumped into him and pushed him agents killer, making him kiss him.

"Ah shxt this can't be good, my bad dust"

Horror said as he slowly backed away. Dust pulled away from killer and just looked at him, his skull getting a bit purple with blush, unsure what to do in this moment.

Killer pov
creator: ARoyalPainAu
